name: Router

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { parser : Url.Parser.Parser (route -> route) route, update : routeMsg -> ( route, Platform.Cmd.Cmd routeMsg ), view : route -> List.List (Html.Html routeMsg), message : Router.Msg routeMsg -> msg, subscriptions : route -> Platform.Sub.Sub routeMsg, notFound : Url.Url -> List.List (Html.Html msg), routeTitle : route -> Maybe.Maybe String.String }

values.name: init
values.type: Router.Config msg route routeMsg -> Url.Url -> Browser.Navigation.Key -> Router.Router route

values.name: mapRoute
values.type: Url.Parser.Parser a routeType -> a -> Url.Parser.Parser (routeType -> b) b

values.name: mapUpdate
values.type: (routeModel -> routeType) -> (routeModel -> routeMsg -> msgType) -> ( routeModel, Platform.Cmd.Cmd routeMsg ) -> ( routeType, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msgType )

values.name: onUrlChange
values.type: Router.Config msg route routeMsg -> Url.Url -> msg

values.name: onUrlRequest
values.type: Router.Config msg route routeMsg -> Browser.UrlRequest -> msg

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: Router.Config msg route routeMsg -> Router.Router route -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

values.name: update
values.type: Router.Config msg route routeMsg -> Router.Msg routeMsg -> Router.Router route -> ( Router.Router route, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: view
values.type: Router.Config msg route routeMsg -> Router.Router route -> List.List (Html.Html msg)
